Alerts

What needs attention before new risk is added.

Macro event cluster

CPI and FOMC both hit within 48 hours. Reduce fresh sizing on high-beta names before confirmation.

Tech concentration

Current and proposed exposure would push technology-linked clusters above the configured threshold.

Catalyst watch

NVDA has the strongest near-term catalyst stack across the current universe.

Top risks

Macro and portfolio hazards currently on deck.

Policy surprise reprices yields

Critical

A hawkish Fed tone would pressure long-duration growth and compress current momentum leadership.

Crowded semiconductor exposure

High

Existing holdings plus watchlist ideas cluster risk in AI infrastructure and semicap.

Shipping disruption spillover

Moderate

Freight and energy effects could re-ignite inflation expectations and rotate leadership abruptly.

NVDA trade packet

Every component of the idea is traceable before any order is placed.

Conviction

89%

Risk verdict

APPROVE

Risk engine approves standard sizing.

Summary

NVIDIA

LONG

Trade summary

NVDA is being surfaced because the current regime supports the setup, the factor stack is strong enough to compete for capital, and the execution plan is already defined before entry.

Portfolio fit

High-conviction growth alpha sleeve

Adds return potential but increases cluster risk.

Factor score breakdown

Configurable weighted scoring out of 100.

Momentum

96 x 14%

Momentum is acting as a tailwind.

Trend Structure

92 x 14%

Trend Structure is acting as a tailwind.

Relative Strength

95 x 12%

Relative Strength is acting as a tailwind.

Volatility Quality

72 x 8%

Volatility Quality is supportive but not elite.

Valuation Sanity

58 x 7%

Valuation Sanity is mixed and needs confirmation.

Macro Fit

84 x 14%

Macro Fit is acting as a tailwind.

Geopolitical Fit

63 x 10%

Geopolitical Fit is supportive but not elite.

Liquidity

98 x 8%

Liquidity is acting as a tailwind.

Catalyst Strength

91 x 13%

Catalyst Strength is acting as a tailwind.

Macro reasons

Why this idea fits the current cycle.

Falling USD and stable yields extend support for long-duration growth leadership.
AI capex remains a late-cycle growth pocket despite softer aggregate manufacturing data.

Geopolitical reasons

Overlay that can accelerate or impair the thesis.

Export restriction risk remains present but is currently contained within a known headline band.
Supply-chain localization trend continues to benefit high-end compute incumbents.

Technical setup

Structure, trigger, and invalidation.

Pattern

High-tight flag

Trigger

Close above 970 with breadth confirmation

Support

$914

Resistance

$970

Order plan plus risk-engine output.

AI reasoning layer

Each agent returns structured JSON for future orchestration.

News Agent

ok
{
  "agent": "News Agent",
  "asOf": "2026-03-14T09:00:00.000Z",
  "status": "ok",
  "payload": {
    "headline": "NVDA catalyst stack remains active into the next macro window.",
    "sentiment": "positive",
    "impactedTickers": [
      "NVDA"
    ],
    "actionBias": "Monitor for breakout confirmation."
  }
}

Macro/Geopolitics Agent

ok
{
  "agent": "Macro/Geopolitics Agent",
  "asOf": "2026-03-14T09:00:00.000Z",
  "status": "ok",
  "payload": {
    "macroRegime": "Falling USD and stable yields extend support for long-duration growth leadership.",
    "geopoliticalOverlay": "Export restriction risk remains present but is currently contained within a known headline band.",
    "keyDrivers": [
      "Falling USD and stable yields extend support for long-duration growth leadership.",
      "AI capex remains a late-cycle growth pocket despite softer aggregate manufacturing data."
    ],
    "watchItems": [
      "Export restriction risk remains present but is currently contained within a known headline band.",
      "Supply-chain localization trend continues to benefit high-end compute incumbents."
    ]
  }
}

ok
{
  "agent": "Opportunity Agent",
  "asOf": "2026-03-14T09:00:00.000Z",
  "status": "ok",
  "payload": {
    "ticker": "NVDA",
    "score": 85,
    "thesis": "NVIDIA screens as a long idea because factor quality, macro fit, and technical structure are aligned.",

      "Momentum: 96",
      "Trend Structure: 92",
      "Relative Strength: 95",
      "Macro Fit: 84",
      "Liquidity: 98",
      "Catalyst Strength: 91"

}

ok
{
  "agent": "Risk Officer Agent",

    "decision": "APPROVE",
    "reasons": [
      "Setup fits current portfolio rules and can be taken at standard size."

    "approvedRiskAed": 7535

}
